reference: Hi. What you are trying to say is termed as paresthesia in the medical field. If you are having a skin rash as well, then you need to see a dermatologist urgently. Common causes include sunburn, heat burn, neuropathy, diabetes, etc. If the problem persists, then first contact your dermatologist and then a physician if required.
text: Hi. What you are trying to say is termed as paresthesia in the medical field. If you are having a skin rash as well, then you need to see a dermatologist urgently. Common causes include sunburn, heat burn, neuropathy, diabetes, etc. If the problem persists, then first contact your dermatologist and then a physician if required.
